metaData.Key Information: Spoilt for choices with this tin of assorted biscuits. A total of 105 sachets with 5 different favours of biscuits which consist of Lemon Flavoured Crackers (4 crackers per sachet), Chocolate Flavoured Cream Biscuits (4 biscuits per sachet), Butter Flavoured Shortcake (4 shortcake per sachet), Chocolate Cream Wafers (2 wafers per sachet)and Chocolate Chips Biscuits (2 biscuits per sachet). These nice assortment biscuits are packed in an easy convenience pack where you can consumed them at anywhere, anytime. Best companion for a breakfast, teabreak or snack. Lee Biscuits are Halal certified and are commited in delivering wholesome goodness products. Do give our biscuits a try today.
